name: markdown-gongwen-view
description: 以党政公文字体风格显示 Markdown 文档 — WYSIWYG inline editor with Chinese government document typography
author: sinnohzeng

commands.title: Markdown Inline Editor: Open Bundled Fonts Folder

editor/title.when: editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == md || editorLangId == mdx || editorLangId == markdoc || editorLangId == mdc || editorLangId == juliamarkdown || editorLangId == rmarkdown

markdownInlineEditor.defaultBehaviors.di.markdownDescription: Apply markdown decorations in diff views. Disabled by default to show raw syntax for easier review.

markdownInlineEditor.decorations.ghostFa.markdownDescription: Opacity of syntax markers when cursor is on a line (0.0-1.0).

markdownInlineEditor.decorations.codeBlo.description: Opacity for code block language identifiers
markdownInlineEditor.decorations.codeBlo.markdownDescription: Opacity of code block language identifiers (0.0-1.0).

markdownInlineEditor.links.singleClickOp.description: Open links and images with single click
markdownInlineEditor.links.singleClickOp.markdownDescription: Single-click to open links and image links (no Ctrl+Click needed). May interfere with text selection.

markdownInlineEditor.emojis.enabled.markdownDescription: Render emoji shortcodes (e.g., :smile:) inline in Markdown documents.

markdownInlineEditor.math.enabled.markdownDescription: Render LaTeX math inline ($...$ and $$...$$). When disabled, math delimiters are shown as plain text.

markdownInlineEditor.mentions.enabled.description: Enable GitHub-style mentions and issue reference styling
markdownInlineEditor.mentions.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable detection and inline styling for GitHub-style mentions and references such as @username, @org/team, #123, and @owner/repo#456.

markdownInlineEditor.mentions.linksEnabl.description: Override clickable mention and issue reference links
markdownInlineEditor.mentions.linksEnabl.markdownDescription: Override git-remote context auto-detection for clickable mention and issue links. `true` forces links on; `false` forces links off; leave unset to use origin remote auto-detection.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.heading1.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-1 headings (e.g. `#e06c75`). Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.heading2.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-2 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.heading3.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-3 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.heading4.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.heading5.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.heading6.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.link.markdownDescription: Hex color for link text. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.listMarker.markdownDescription: Hex color for list markers (unordered and ordered). Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.inlineCode.markdownDescription: Hex color for inline code. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.inlineCodeBa.description: Hex color for inline code background
markdownInlineEditor.colors.inlineCodeBa.markdownDescription: Hex color for inline code background overlay. Leave empty to use theme-aware default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.emphasis.markdownDescription: Hex color for emphasis (bold/italic). Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.blockquote.markdownDescription: Hex color for blockquote markers and/or text. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.image.description: Hex color for image link text
markdownInlineEditor.colors.image.markdownDescription: Hex color for image link text/placeholder. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.horizontalRu.description: Hex color for horizontal rule line
markdownInlineEditor.colors.horizontalRu.markdownDescription: Hex color for horizontal rule line. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.colors.checkbox.description: Hex color for checkbox (unchecked and checked)
markdownInlineEditor.colors.checkbox.markdownDescription: Hex color for unchecked and checked checkbox symbols. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.heading1.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-1 headings (e.g. `Arial, SimHei, sans-serif`). English fonts should come first for CJK mixed text. Leave empty to use editor default.
CSS font-weight for level-1 headings (`normal`, `bold`, `100`–`900`). Leave empty to use extension default.
CSS font-size for level-1 headings (e.g. `180%`, `22pt`, `1.4em`). Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.heading2.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-2 headings (e.g. `Arial, KaiTi, serif`). Leave empty to use editor default.
CSS font-weight for level-2 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.
CSS font-size for level-2 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.heading3.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-3 headings (e.g. `"Times New Roman", FangSong, serif`). Leave empty to use editor default.
CSS font-weight for level-3 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.
CSS font-size for level-3 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.heading4.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use editor default.
CSS font-weight for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.
CSS font-size for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.heading5.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use editor default.
CSS font-weight for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.
CSS font-size for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.heading6.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use editor default.
CSS font-weight for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.
CSS font-size for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.emphasis.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for bold/italic emphasis text. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.emphasis.font.description: CSS font-weight override for bold emphasis
markdownInlineEditor.fonts.emphasis.font.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight override for bold emphasis (e.g. `900` for extra bold). Leave empty to use default `bold`.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.body.fontFami.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for body/paragraph text (e.g. `"Times New Roman", "Source Han Serif SC", serif`). Fonts must be installed on your system. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownInlineEditor.fonts.body.fontWeig.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for body/paragraph text (e.g. `300` for light weight). Leave empty to use default.

scripts.test:e2e: npm run bundle && npm run compile:e2e && vscode-test
scripts.test:e2e:cursor: npm run bundle && npm run compile:e2e && node scripts/cursor-test.mjs
scripts.test:report: NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest && echo 'HTML report generated at: dist/test-report/report.html'
scripts.build: npm run copy:mermaid && npm run compile && npm run bundle:prod && npm run package
scripts.build:dev: npm run compile && npm run bundle && npm run package
scripts.validate: npm run lint:docs && npm test && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
